payload.notes: Qwen3.6 27B INT4 AutoRound on Intel Arc Pro B70. Local vLLM XPU patches route Qwen3.6 MTP speculative Gated DeltaNet through a generic fallback when speculative masks are present. One warmup, one measured latency bench. Latency 5.67s; MTP acceptance 86.0%.

engineFlags.extraFlags: VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=xpu VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:0 ZE_AFFINITY_MASK=0 --quantization inc --dtype half --language-model-only --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1

payload.notes: Longer decode run for patched vLLM XPU MTP fallback on single Intel Arc Pro B70. One warmup, one measured latency bench. Latency 12.40s; measured MTP acceptance varied by generated content, with measured pass acceptance 65.4%.

engineFlags.extraFlags: VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE=xpu VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:0 ZE_AFFINITY_MASK=0 --quantization inc --dtype half --language-model-only --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1

payload.notes: Best current dual-B70 result. vLLM TP2 non-MTP with XCCL P2P enabled. One warmup, one measured latency bench. Latency 5.22s. MTP was slower in TP2 because XPU graph capture is disabled for communication ops.

engineFlags.extraFlags: ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR=level_zero:* CCL_ATL_TRANSPORT=ofi CCL_ZE_IPC_EXCHANGE=sockets CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 --quantization inc --dtype half --language-model-only --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --distributed-executor-backend mp --disable-custom-all-reduce

payload.notes: Longer decode run for dual Intel Arc Pro B70 TP2 non-MTP. One warmup, one measured latency bench. Latency 10.59s. XCCL P2P enabled; large all-reduce microbench measured about 42 GB/s payload.

payload.notes: Single-B70 vLLM INT4 non-MTP baseline. One warmup, one measured latency bench. Latency 8.06s. XPU graph enabled.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: vllm bench latency --model /home/steve/models/hf/Lorbus-Qwen3.6-27B-int4-AutoRound --max-model-len 4096 --input-len 500 --output-len 256 --batch-size 1 --num-iters 1 --num-iters-warmup 1 --dtype half --quantization inc --language-model-only --kv-cache-memory-bytes 2G --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --distributed-executor-backend uni

payload.notes: Dual-B70 TP2 plus patched MTP fallback. Included as negative result: slower than TP2 non-MTP and single-B70 MTP. Latency 7.20s. Warmup acceptance was 62.6%; vLLM disables XPU graph capture for TP2 communication ops.
